title: Pivot to full-slate NBA player prop ranking (not SGP)
summary: Pivot from SGP to full-slate NBA player prop scanning with net-edge ranking
core_requirements: Full-slate player prop scanning across all NBA games
build_rules: Same-game parlays are no longer the primary product
Single props are the main decision unit
Confirmed OUT can create bounded opportunity uplift
GTD must reduce confidence, not create fake directional conviction
Stale/conflicted data must penalise or fail closed
No wrapper-only implementation of quant rules
required_proof_before_pete_review: Reason codes and injury/GTD fields visible in artifacts
quant_gate: Pete review is binding before treated as ready

next_action: Run full-slate scan, produce first CANDIDATE/NO_BET/BLOCKED artifacts
